title: Lesson 536: 年月, 図書, 年寄...

items.gloss: old person; elderly person; senior citizen; trustee of the Japan Sumo Association; retired high-ranking wrestler who is licensed to coach and receives retirement pay; senior statesman (of the Tokugawa shogunate); important local official (under the Tokugawa Shogunate)
to close (e.g. book, eyes, meeting, etc.); to shut
just (now, at the moment, etc.); just as; in the act of; as soon as; at the moment that
plot of land; lot; soil; locality; region; place
